---
title: "Project"
author: "S Supraja"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
```

Phone Data Analysis
```{r}
multiple_phone_folder_path <- "/home/supraja/BRSM/Project/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/multiple/phone"
single_phone_folder_path <- "/home/supraja/BRSM/Project/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/single/phone"

#get file lists separately
multiple_phone_file_list <- list.files(multiple_phone_folder_path,
                                       pattern = "\\.csv$",
                                       full.names = TRUE)

single_phone_file_list <- list.files(single_phone_folder_path,
                                     pattern = "\\.csv$",
                                     full.names = TRUE)

#combine file lists correctly
file_list <- c(multiple_phone_file_list, single_phone_file_list)

#print(file_list)

multiple_phone_data <- map_df(multiple_phone_file_list, function(file) {
  df <- read_csv(file)
  df$SourceFile <- basename(file)
  df$TaskType <- "Multiple"
  return(df)
})

single_phone_data <- map_df(single_phone_file_list, function(file) {
  df <- read_csv(file)
  df$SourceFile <- basename(file)
  df$TaskType <- "Single"
  return(df)
})

# Combine both datasets
all_data <- bind_rows(multiple_phone_data, single_phone_data)

#print(head(all_data))
```

```{r}
all_data <- all_data %>%
  mutate(
    TaskType = as.factor(TaskType),
    Level = as.factor(Level),
    InitialResponseTime_ms = as.numeric(`InitialResponseTime(ms)`),
    AvgInterTargetTime_ms = as.numeric(`AvgInterTargetTime(ms)`),
    SuccessRate = as.numeric(`SuccessRate(%)`),
    HitRate = as.numeric(`HitRate(%)`),
    FalseAlarms = as.numeric(FalseAlarms)
  )

print(all_data)
all_data <- all_data %>%
  filter(Completed == TRUE)

print(all_data)
```

Normality test
```{r}
shapiro.test(all_data$InitialResponseTime_ms)
```

Summary for reference
```{r}
summary_stats <- all_data %>%
  group_by(TaskType, Level) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_RT = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_RT = IQR(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_Success = median(SuccessRate, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_Success = IQR(SuccessRate, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_FA = median(FalseAlarms, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_FA = IQR(FalseAlarms, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(summary_stats)


level_summary <- all_data %>%
  group_by(Level) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_RT = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_RT = IQR(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(level_summary)

participant_summary <- all_data %>%
  group_by(SourceFile) %>%
  summarise(
    median_RT = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_success = median(SuccessRate, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
print(participant_summary)

rt_by_participant <- all_data %>%
  group_by(SourceFile, TaskType) %>%
  summarise(
    median_RT = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```


VISUALIZATIONS

Median Initial Reaction Time Trend by Level
```{r}

rt_participant_level <- all_data %>%
  group_by(SourceFile, TaskType, Level) %>%
  summarise(
    median_RT = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(rt_participant_level)
ggplot(rt_participant_level, aes(x = Level, y = median_RT, color = TaskType, group = TaskType)) + 
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) + 
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3) + 
  labs(title = "Median Initial Reaction Time Trend by Level", x = "Level", y = "Median Initial Reaction Time (ms)") + 
  theme_minimal()

#per-participant median IRT (same as before, but now clean)
rt_participant_level <- all_data %>%
  group_by(SourceFile, TaskType, Level) %>%
  summarise(
    median_irt = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_trials   = n(),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

#Summary table for quick look (median IRT + n participants per cell)
comparison_table <- rt_participant_level %>%
  group_by(TaskType, Level) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_IRT_ms   = median(median_irt, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_IRT         = IQR(median_irt, na.rm = TRUE),
    Participants    = n(),
    .groups         = "drop"
  )
print(comparison_table)


```
Median Avg Inter-Target Time Comparison Across Levels
```{r}
#per-participant median AIT by Level & TaskType
ait_participant_level <- all_data %>%
  group_by(SourceFile, TaskType, Level) %>%
  summarise(
    median_ait = median(AvgInterTargetTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_trials   = n(),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

#Summary table for quick look (median AIT + n participants per cell)
ait_comparison_table <- ait_participant_level %>%
  group_by(TaskType, Level) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_AIT_ms = median(median_ait, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_AIT       = IQR(median_ait, na.rm = TRUE),
    Participants  = n(),
    .groups       = "drop"
  )

#print(ait_comparison_table)

median_iqr <- function(x) {
  med <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  iqr <- IQR(x, na.rm = TRUE) / 2
  data.frame(y = med, ymin = med - iqr, ymax = med + iqr)
}

ggplot(ait_participant_level, 
       aes(x = Level, y = median_ait, color = TaskType, group = TaskType)) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3.5) +
  #stat_summary(fun.data = median_iqr, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Avg Inter-Target Time Comparison Across Levels",
       x = "Level",
       y = "Median Avg Inter-Target Time (ms)",
       color = "Task Type") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

```

Reaction time variability across levels
```{r}
rt_var <- phone_data_clean %>%
  group_by(Level, TaskType) %>%
  summarise(
    sd_RT = sd(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_RT = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(rt_var, aes(Level, sd_RT)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~TaskType) +
  labs(
    title = "Response Time Variability Across Difficulty Levels",
    x = "Difficulty Level",
    y = "SD of Initial Response Time (ms)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

Considering lab and phone environments for the below:

Correlation Analysis 
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
```


```{r}

phone_data <- all_data %>%
  mutate(
    DeviceType = "Phone",
    TaskType = ifelse(GameMode == "multipleTargets", "Multiple", "Single"),
    InitialResponseTime_ms = as.numeric(`InitialResponseTime(ms)`),
    SourceFile = sub("_.*", "", SourceFile)
  )

multiple_lab_folder <- "/home/supraja/BRSM/Project/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/multiple/lab"
single_lab_folder   <- "/home/supraja/BRSM/Project/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/single/lab"

read_lab_data <- function(folder, task) {
  
  files <- list.files(folder, pattern="\\.csv$", full.names=TRUE)
  
  all_data <- lapply(files, function(file) {
    
    df <- read.csv(file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    
    first_rt <- as.numeric(sub("\\[([0-9.]+).*", "\\1", df$mouse.time))
    
    data.frame(
      SourceFile = sub("_.*", "", basename(file)),
      TaskType = task,
      DeviceType = "Lab",
      Level = df$trials.thisN,
      InitialResponseTime_ms = first_rt * 1000
    )
    
  })
  
  do.call(rbind, all_data)
}

multiple_lab_data <- read_lab_data(multiple_lab_folder, "Multiple")
#print(multiple_lab_data)
single_lab_data   <- read_lab_data(single_lab_folder, "Single")
#print(single_lab_data)

lab_data <- bind_rows(multiple_lab_data, single_lab_data)

phone_data_clean <- phone_data %>%
  select(SourceFile, TaskType, DeviceType, Level, InitialResponseTime_ms) %>%
  mutate(Level = as.numeric(Level))

lab_data_clean <- lab_data %>%
  select(SourceFile, TaskType, DeviceType, Level, InitialResponseTime_ms) %>%
  mutate(Level = as.numeric(Level))

combined_data <- bind_rows(phone_data_clean, lab_data_clean)

combined_data <- combined_data %>%
  mutate(Group = paste(TaskType, DeviceType, sep = "-"))

rt_participant <- combined_data %>%
  group_by(SourceFile, Group) %>%
  summarise(
    median_RT = median(InitialResponseTime_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

rt_wide <- rt_participant %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = median_RT)

#print(rt_wide)

# Single task correlation
single_data <- rt_wide %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Single-Lab`) & !is.na(`Single-Phone`))

single_cor <- cor(single_data[,c("Single-Lab","Single-Phone")], method="spearman")[1,2]

# Multiple task correlation
multiple_data <- rt_wide %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Multiple-Lab`) & !is.na(`Multiple-Phone`))

multiple_cor <- cor(multiple_data[,c("Multiple-Lab","Multiple-Phone")], method="spearman")[1,2]

cor_results <- data.frame(
  Task = c("Single Target", "Multiple Target"),
  Spearman_Correlation = c(single_cor, multiple_cor)
)

print(cor_results)

level_rt_cor <- combined_data %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    Spearman_Correlation = cor(Level, InitialResponseTime_ms,
                               method = "spearman",
                               use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(level_rt_cor)

```

Hypothesis Testing:

```{r}
#H1 test
wilcox.test(median_RT ~ TaskType, data = rt_by_participant)

#H2 test for single and multiple
single_test  <- combined_data %>% filter(TaskType == "Single")
multiple_test <- combined_data %>% filter(TaskType == "Multiple")
wilcox.test(InitialResponseTime_ms ~ DeviceType, data = single_test)
wilcox.test(InitialResponseTime_ms ~ DeviceType, data = multiple_test)

#H3 test
cor.test(lab_data_clean$Level,
         lab_data_clean$InitialResponseTime_ms,
         method="spearman")

rt_var <- phone_data_clean %>%
  group_by(Level) %>%
  summarise(sd_RT = sd(InitialResponseTime_ms))

#H4 test
cor.test(rt_var$Level,
         rt_var$sd_RT,
         method = "spearman")
```
